# Polyglot Fallback Fixture

This fixture proves that non-TS languages and common text/config files still produce safe path and lexical context.

It intentionally contains Python, Java, Kotlin, Go, Rust, C#, Ruby, PHP, Swift,
C, C++, shell, Markdown, JSON, YAML, and TOML files without requiring Grape to
claim full semantic graph support for those languages or file types.
